author: mai

health_badge_visibility_card_view.details: Error badges use rgb(255, 77, 106) on semi-transparent red bg (~6:1 contrast). Clearly visible bottom-right of each card. Consistent in both dark and light mode.

zero_state_color_semantics.details: 0/0 Running Pods uses muted gray-blue rgb(107, 121, 148) with opacity-50 class. Total Nodes '30' uses gradient-text (vibrant purple gradient). Clear visual differentiation — 0/0 is NOT green, visually dimmed vs active metrics.

details.filter_tags: PASS - #dev, #k3s etc use rgb(160, 174, 192) on rgb(13, 15, 25) bg = ~8.8:1 contrast (AAA)
details.card_subtitle: PASS - K8s v1.xx · Nodes: N uses rgb(160, 174, 192) at 11px = ~8.8:1 contrast (WCAG AA pass)
details.sidebar_section_headers: FAIL - AUTOSCALING/ACCESS CONTROL use lab(48.0876 -2.03595 -16.5814) ≈ slate-500 on dark bg (3.8:1) and light bg (4.09:1). Both fail WCAG AA (requires 4.5:1 at 11px). dark:text-slate-300 class not computing correctly.
details.environment_badges: MARGINAL - Production/Dev/Minikube badges use monochromatic scheme (same hue for text and bg). Low but borderline contrast.

provider_logos_dark_mode.details: AWS, Azure, GKE, Minikube, kubeconfig logos render without text overlap. Icon+label pairs are properly spaced. No layout compression observed at 1200px viewport. Minor: kubeconfig text is small (11px) but readable.

sidebar_section_headers_visibility.details: AUTOSCALING and ACCESS CONTROL section headers are visible but fail WCAG AA contrast. Dark mode: ~3.8:1 (bg rgb(20,24,37), text ≈ slate-500). Light mode: ~4.09:1 (bg rgb(237,240,245), text ≈ slate-500). Required: 4.5:1 at 11px. dark:text-slate-300 variant appears not applied.

code_bugs.description: dark:text-slate-300 Tailwind class not applied in dark mode — computed color is lab(48.0876 -2.03595 -16.5814) (≈ slate-500) in BOTH dark and light mode. Result: sidebar section headers fail WCAG AA in both modes.
code_bugs.fix: Ensure dark:text-slate-300 overrides text-slate-500 in dark mode, or use CSS custom property that properly applies dark variant

code_bugs.description: Production/Dev/Minikube environment badges use monochromatic color scheme (same hue for text and background). Borderline contrast ratios, particularly for Production (red-on-pink) and Dev (green-on-green).
code_bugs.fix: Increase contrast between badge text and badge background, or use white/dark text on colored badge background

what_works_well: Health badges (Error) are bright, visible, consistently positioned bottom-right
Zero-state 0/0 pods correctly dimmed vs active metrics (opacity-50 + muted color)
Provider logos clean in dark mode — no text overlap anywhere
Filter tags (#dev, #k3s etc) have excellent contrast (~8.8:1, AAA)
Card subtitle metadata is readable at 11px with good contrast
Dark mode toggle works (System → Dark → System cycle)
Anomalies section with Critical/Warning/Info correctly color-coded
ux_recommendations: Fix sidebar section headers contrast — must reach 4.5:1 for WCAG AA at 11px
Improve environment badge contrast using white text on colored background instead of monochromatic
Consider adding a health indicator to the sidebar section for clusters (not just in cards)
Karpenter and Teams navigation items should remain visible after sidebar collapse
